summary: Frontend date format verification completed. The new dateUtils.ts implementation is correctly applied across the app. Verified date formats on: take-attendance page (shows Gregorian 'الإثنين، 23 فبراير' as primary with Hijri '6 رمضان 1447 هـ' as secondary), course-students lecture chips (shows '23 فبراير' in Arabic), and schedule page. The student login credentials (736551455/736551455) returned 401 - may need fresh test data.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ dateUtils.ts correctly implements all date formatting functions (formatGregorianDate, formatHijriDate, formatDualDate, formatTime, formatMonthYear)
✓ GREGORIAN_MONTHS_AR array has Arabic month names: يناير، فبراير، مارس... etc
✓ HIJRI_MONTHS_AR array has Arabic Hijri month names: محرم، صفر، ربيع الأول... etc
✓ gregorianToHijri() function converts Gregorian dates to Hijri using Julian day calculation
✓ getAdenDate() uses UTC+3 timezone offset for Aden time
✓ take-attendance.tsx correctly shows date as 'الإثنين، 23 فبراير' (Gregorian) with '6 رمضان 1447 هـ' (Hijri) below
✓ course-students.tsx lecture chips show dates formatted with formatGregorianDate()
✓ my-schedule.tsx uses GREGORIAN_MONTHS_AR and formatHijriDate for calendar display
✓ activity-logs.tsx uses formatGregorianDate and formatTime for log timestamps
context_for_next_testing_agent: Date format implementation verified. All pages correctly use dateUtils.ts with Gregorian (Arabic month names like فبراير) as primary and Hijri (like رمضان 1447 هـ) as secondary. The take-attendance page clearly shows both formats. Student test credentials may need to be refreshed in the database.

course_students_page.lecture_chips: Shows day name + date (e.g., اليوم, 23 فبراير)

schedule_page.semester_dates: Shows semester range with Gregorian dates
